groove_engine.description: Fused bass + percussion as one continuity-bearing locomotion unit. Propulsion spine.

floating_upper_motion.description: Elevated or suspended layers (synth haze, hovering vocals) held above a grounded base.

coherent_variation.description: Stable authored identity with internal mutation. Recognizable fingerprint with range.

crooked_coherence.description: Systems that lean sideways or feel haunted/psychedelic while remaining structurally intact.

threshold_attraction.description: Structures at the edge of legibility—half-emerged, half-dissolved, or phasing near a boundary.

return_passage_salience.description: Attraction to the structural event of a loop return and the distinct passage before it.

coherent_abrasion.description: Grain, pressure, and strain (distortion, dark harmonies) without structural loss.

elegant_sweetness.description: Beauty softened by restraint, melancholy, or wistful tension. Just sad enough.

bright_authored_pop.description: Clean, melodic pop that breathes internally and possesses witty/symbolic structure.

timbral_precision_oboe.description: Reedy, plaintive, sharp, and emotionally piercing timbres.

timbral_melancholy_bassoon.description: Woody, grounded, and expressively heavy/melancholy timbres.
